Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5609 Size 19-13.5-6
Goya is a structured compact bag, very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It is a testament to exquisite craftsmanship and a new LOEWE product worth buying.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini Saddle Bag ~ Besace Arc de Triomphe
The real thing is truly beautiful, retro yet stylish, and goes well with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the mini version, the handle design is playful and cute. A style you'll fall in love with at first glance, exuding elegance when photographed. Can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, and cute~
Capacity: Doesn't fit large phones well, but can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model No.: 10L062 Monogram Brown (Hardware is pure steel)
Dimensions: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from black calfskin, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde silhouette.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap adorned with the classic Serpenti head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and is accented with the BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Dimensions: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104
